name: Sui Yuanjin
page_title: Sui Yuanjin 眭元進 [Yuan Shao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Sui Yuanjin served as an officer in Yuan Shao’s supply train near Guandu. He died when the supply train was attacked by Cao Cao’s raiding party. (1)

1: Sanguo zhi 1:22 (Cao Cao)

full_text:
Sui Yuanjin 眭元進
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sui Yuanjin (眭元進). Part of the defenders of Yuan Shao’s supply camp, captured and executed. Sui Yuanjin was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Sui Yuanjin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
